use_cases: Displaying structured tabular data with columns and rows in dashboards or admin panels
Filtering and searching large datasets across multiple columns
Sorting data by clicking column headers in ascending or descending order
Paginating through large data sets with customizable items per page
Handling user interactions like row clicks for navigation or detail views
ai_summary: A versatile data table component with built-in search, sorting, column filtering, and pagination capabilities. Supports customizable styling through props like striped rows, borders, hover states, and compact mode. Designed for displaying and managing structured data efficiently in dashboards, admin interfaces, and data-heavy applications across various industries.
